metadata.description: The reality-check skill that does not just argue, it checks: it researches the real world (reception, demand, forecast, precedent) instead of giving a louder opinion, then tells you what to keep, cut, rework, or park.

plugins.name: kill-your-darlings
plugins.description: The reality-check that does not just argue, it checks: it researches the real world (reception, demand, forecast, precedent) instead of giving a louder opinion, names the ideas you are too attached to, and returns an evidence-backed keep/cut/rework/park verdict plus a get-back-on-track plan. A 'kill your darlings' partner for any project, plan, draft, feature, roadmap, or pitch.
